response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned senior developer with broad full-stack experience and notable systems work in DLang (low-latency microservices at Sociomantic, C/C++ at National Instruments), plus GIS exposure through GISCollective and Green Map. However, the role demands modern C++ or Rust as a primary skill, and the resume shows only brief, dated C/C++ work from 2014-2015 and no Rust. Recent experience is dominated by TypeScript/Node.js, which is misaligned with the routing tiling pipeline role.
strengths: Geospatial/GIS background via GISCollective and Green Map
Prior low-latency, high-throughput systems work in DLang at Sociomantic
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling
concerns: Modern C++ experience is minimal and ~10 years stale; no Rust
No demonstrated distributed-systems or data-pipeline-at-scale work
